name: 风衣妈妈
face_geometry: oval face with soft rounded contours and defined cheekbones
hair_silhouette: medium-length wavy hair cascading to shoulders with loose curls
body_frame: medium build with upright straight posture, shoulders back, hands crossed at waist level
wardrobe_signature: tailored beige trench coat with belt, paired with fitted blouse and slim pants
pairwise_forbidden_similarity: Avoid slim young mother rounded oval face and low ponytail from SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
Avoid faded white T-shirt and protective leaning posture from SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
Avoid narrow shoulder slim build and cautious forward tilt from ZHAO_YIMING
Avoid square sharp jawline male face and wide shoulder dominant stance from LU_JINGCHEN
Avoid mild square-round face and straight medium hair from EXTRA_FRIEND_PARENT
Avoid long rectangular face and simple ponytail from EXTRA_TEACHER
Avoid child round face with baby fat and casual play stance from EXTRA_CHILD or SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD

appearance.face_shape: mature oval with soft jawline and subtle fullness in cheeks
appearance.facial_features: almond-shaped eyes with subtle eyeliner, slightly raised eyebrows conveying superiority, straight medium nose bridge, full lips in a neutral to slight smirk line
appearance.hair: medium-length dark brown wavy hair, center parted, styled with loose waves for urban elegance
appearance.skin: fair Asian tone with smooth even complexion, light foundation and neutral lipstick
appearance.body: average height around 165cm, balanced bust and hips, firm posture with weight evenly distributed
appearance.expression: neutral with a subtle upward tilt to eyebrows and direct gaze

costume.fixed_outfit: knee-length beige trench coat with notched lapels and self-belt tied at waist, white fitted button-up blouse tucked in, black slim-leg trousers, black low-heeled pumps
costume.colors: beige for coat, crisp white for blouse, black for trousers and shoes
costume.materials: high-quality wool blend for trench coat, silk for blouse, wool-polyester blend for trousers, leather for pumps
costume.wardrobe_continuity: beige trench coat remains fixed across all appearances, blouse and trousers consistent in style and color without seasonal changes

distinction_anchors: Mature oval face with raised eyebrows distinct from young slim rounded faces or sharp male squares
Wavy medium-length hair differs from low ponytails, straight cuts, or short business styles
Beige wool trench coat contrasts with plain T-shirts, knitwear, or casual childrenswear
Upright crossed-hands posture sets apart from protective leans, cautious tilts, or playful child stances
风衣妈妈有可执行的脸型骨相，与其他角色明显不同
正常真人头身比，体态符合年龄
固定服装来自角色设定，同一集内不换装
三十多岁幼儿园家长，成熟圆脸或鹅蛋脸，优越感微扬眉
精致风衣，米色或浅灰高端材质，体现阶层
中长卷发或优雅盘发，精致都市感
直立姿态，双手交叉或轻触风衣，带审视
forbidden_drift: age drift to under 25 or over 45 years
face shape drift to slim youthful or angular sharp forms
clothing era error to pre-2000s or futuristic styles
region sense error to Japanese urban suspense aesthetics like dim lighting or noir tones
excessive beautification such as heavy filters or idealized proportions
portrait_prompt: Close-up portrait of a 30-35 year old Chinese woman in modern urban Chinese city background, mature oval face with soft jawline, almond eyes and slightly raised eyebrows in neutral superior expression, medium-length dark brown wavy hair center parted, fair smooth skin with light makeup, wearing beige wool trench coat over white silk blouse, upright posture with hands crossed at waist, normal adult 7.5 heads proportion, realistic details, no Japanese suspense influences or excessive filters。比例契约：normal adult 7.5 to 8 heads proportion
